name: Wood Man Cutter
description: Welcome to Wood Man Cutter 3D Game! Tap and hold to start walking, rotating with an elastic rope. Begin cutting wood from trees, but be careful to avoid metal objects and rocks. Can you pass the level 3? Enjoy this game on gamemonetize.com
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Adventure, cut, Forest, Hypercasual, Relaxation, Unity3D
